name: Chocolate Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Lightly grease a baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat the margarine and sugars until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. In another bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa, baking soda, sugar, and cinnamon.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Chill the dough for several hours (or overnight).
7. Roll the chilled dough into 2-inch balls and roll each ball in a mixture of 2 tablespoons sugar, cinnamon, and cocoa powder.
8. Place the rolled cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden. Do not overbake.
10. Cool on wire racks.
